title: senecio cochlearifolius
intro: Senecio cochlearifolius, also known as the ear-leaved ragwort, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and as a diuretic. The health benefits of Senecio cochlearifolius include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
